mes.info: mode_name = BFS mode_macro = MOD_CODE_BFS namespace = bfs_m
mes.err:
bin_file_ctor_err_begin
bin_file_ctor_coding_errors_begin coding_error_bin_file_try_build_from_empty_path coding_error_bin_file_unfair_init_type_value bin_file_ctor_coding_errors_end
bin_file_ctor_filesystem_errors_begin service_error_bin_file_file_not_existed_when_build_with_choice_of_open_existed service_error_bin_file_file_can_not_open_when_build_with_choice_of_open_existed service_error_bin_file_file_already_existed_when_build_with_choice_of_create service_error_bin_file_constructor_cannot_create service_error_bin_file_unknown_error_when_open bin_file_ctor_filesystem_errors_end

bin_file_open_err_end
